title: Skills SMP
description: SkillsSMP: Skill-point system with GUI, revival beacon, custom items and crafting limits; player /skillpoints and admin /revival, /skillsadmin.
body: SkillsSMP, focuses on enhancing the survival experience through a complete skill-point and custom ability system. Players earn and spend skill points through an interactive GUI opened via /skillpoints or related aliases. These points can be invested into various skill categories, allowing players to specialize and differentiate themselves from others on the server. The plugin includes crafting restrictions, custom items, and a revival-based death management system to introduce meaningful challenge and progression. Admin-level commands like /skillsadmin and /revival offer complete control over player skills and revival mechanics, making the plugin excellent for competitive SMPs, progression-based survival worlds, or hardcore-style servers where strategy and player growth matter. Both plugins enhance gameplay depth, provide long-term progression, and deliver unique mechanics that keep players engaged for hours.
